descriptionHtml:
Wooden Motor Sailer 38 Meters for Sale 2000 | 8 en-suite Cabins | Tax Not Paid

Refitted in 2004-2008

If you’re searching for a unique vessel that blends traditional craftsmanship with modern convenience, the Wooden Motor Sailer 38 Meters for Sale 2000 could be a strong consideration. Built in 2000 and thoughtfully refitted between 2004 and 2008, this classic wooden sailer remains in good condition. Every stateroom also has an ensuite bathroom, ensuring privacy and comfort for all guests aboard.

Here are the full specifications:

Wooden Motor Sailer 38 Meters for Sale 2000 – Specifications

  • Year of Build: 2000
  • Refit: 2004-2008
  • Length Overall (LOA): 38.00 meters
  • Beam: 9.4 meters
  • Draft: 3.9 meters
  • Cabins: 8 staterooms
    • 2 Double bed cabins
    • 2 Double-single cabins
    • 4 Twin cabins (2 with pullman beds)
  • Accommodation: Up to 20 guests
  • Heads/Bathrooms: 8 (all ensuite)
  • Engine: Caterpillar, 542 HP, 5,833 hours
  • Max Speed: 12 knots
  • Cruising Speed: 11 knots
  • Fuel Consumption: 140 litres/hour
  • Fuel Tank Capacity: 15,000 litres
  • Water Tank Capacity: 3,000 litres
  • Steering Wheel: 1
  • Generators:
    • Onan 1x27 kW (10,700 hours)
    • Onan 1x22 kW (14,600 hours)
  • Navigation & Electronics: Plotter, GPS, Autopilot
  • Entertainment: SAT TV, VCR, DVD, stereo with CD player in salon, camcorder, cellular phone, Wifi
  • Additional Equipment: Deck shower, electric fridge, dinghy with outboard

Overall, this wooden motor sailer offers a tasteful blend of tradition and comfort. Her steady condition, thoughtful amenities, and spacious layout make her a reliable option for those seeking a classic yet practical yacht. If you’re interested in further details or would like to arrange a viewing, the Wooden Motor Sailer 38 Meters for Sale 2000 is available for discussion.
